column1: # Anime-cutscene subtitles. recno_hex (6 hex of $FE$FD$FC, the voice line's CD recno) <TAB> English.
# The renderer latches the live recno when $FD==$76 (voice/ADPCM region) and expands the matching line
# from a 1bpp font into VRAM tiles on the fly. Crater voice lines are contiguous from $707600 ($FE
# increments per line). All-caps (8px subset font). Placeholders below - the team replaces the text.
# $747600 = "A NEW JOURNEY" (confirmed on screen); the rest are dummy until the transcript arrives.
